title: hy3-mcp | Hy3 Research & Code Assistant (MCP server)  [OFFLINE DEMO MODE]
lines: This recording drives a REAL hy3-mcp server subprocess over MCP
stdio, using an independent raw JSON-RPC client. No API key is
configured, so the server uses its deterministic offline backend;
every reply below is a genuine server response, clearly labeled.
$ HY3_MCP_OFFLINE=1 python -m hy3_mcp     # stdio MCP server

title: step 2/5 - tools/list (5 tools)  [OFFLINE DEMO MODE]
lines: -> review_code    Code review: reads a unified diff (or a source file inside

-> analyze_data   Data analysis: reads a sandboxed CSV or JSON records file,
-> deep_research  Deep research: gathers evidence from the pluggable search
-> hy3_status     Diagnostics: reports server version, backend mode (offline
-> 5 tools, all with param schemas + outputSchema

title: step 5/5 - call ask_docs (knowledge-base Q&A)  [OFFLINE DEMO MODE]
lines: $ tools/call ask_docs {"question": "What is the context length
> OFFLINE DEMO MODE (fake Hy3 backend) -- deterministic canned analysis
According to the knowledge base: # Hy3 Model Overview ## Key specifications
Hy3 is Tencent Hunyuan's flagship open-source large language model. The
context length of Hy3 is 256K tokens, which enables long-document
understanding and stable multi-turn agent workflows. The model uses a
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with 295B total parameters, of which
21B are active per token. ## Reasoning modes Hy3 supports three reasoning

title: switch to the real Hy3 backend (one env var)  [OFFLINE DEMO MODE]
lines: $ export HY3_API_KEY=<your key from the console>
